biological_replicate: at least two of the three biological replicates
technical_replicate: present with at least two copies per sample
experimental_design: preliminary investigation into whether EVs produced by A. pullulans might play a role in the biocontrol potential
factor_value: biocontrol function of EVs produced by A. pullulans on spores of phytopathogenic fungi
number_of_fractions: sucrose density gradient consisting of 400 µL fractions of 20%, 24%, 28%, 32%, 36%, 40%, 44%, 48%, 52%, 56%, and 60% sucrose
number_of_technical_replicates: present with at least two copies per sample
